creator: doc@lublin.t1.pl
text:
Originator:	Michal P.
 Confidential:	no <FreeBSD PRs are public data>
 Synopsis:	Update of devel/mingw packages
 Severity:       serious
 Priority:	medium
 Category:	ports
 Class:		change-request
 Release:	FreeBSD 4.3-STABLE i386
 System: FreeBSD pm125.knurow.sdi.tpnet.pl 4.3-STABLE FreeBSD 4.3-STABLE #1: Fri Jul 20 19:27:15 CEST 2001 doc@pm125.knurow.sdi.tpnet.pl:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/KNUREK i386
 
 
 Description:
 	MinGW packages has not been updated since a *YEAR*. 
 	Now they include buggy linker (dumps core on certain libraries)
 	
 Fix:
 	Use included archive
 	
 	
 # This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
 # this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
 # create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
 # have default permissions.
 #
 # This archive contains:
 #
 #	devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt
 #	devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/Makefile
 #	devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/distinfo
 #	devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-comment
 #	devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-descr
 #	devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-plist
 #	devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/files
 #	devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/files/Makefile
 #	devel/mingw-binutils
 #	devel/mingw-binutils/Makefile
 #	devel/mingw-binutils/distinfo
 #	devel/mingw-binutils/pkg-comment
 #	devel/mingw-binutils/pkg-descr
 #	devel/mingw-binutils/pkg-plist
 #	devel/mingw-gcc
 #	devel/mingw-gcc/Makefile
 #	devel/mingw-gcc/distinfo
 #	devel/mingw-gcc/pkg-comment
 #	devel/mingw-gcc/pkg-descr
 #	devel/mingw-gcc/pkg-plist
 #
 echo c - devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt
 mkdir -p devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt > /dev/null 2>&1
 echo x - devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/Makefile
 sed 's/^X//' >devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/Makefile << 'END-of-devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/Makefile'
 X# New ports collection makefile for: mingw-msvcrt
 X# Date created:		28 June 2001
 X# Whom:			Michal Pasternak <doc@hisio.safenet.pl>
 X#
 X# $FreeBSD$
 X#
 X
 XPORTNAME=	bin-msvcrt
 XPORTVERSION=	1.0
 XCATEGORIES=	devel
 XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	mingw
 XPKGNAMEPREFIX= 	mingw-
 XDIST_SUBDIR=	mingw
 X
 XMAINTAINER=	doc@hisio.safenet.pl
 X
 XDISTFILES = mingw-runtime-1.0-20010604${EXTRACT_SUFX} \
 X		w32api-1.0-20010606${EXTRACT_SUFX}
 X
 XNO_MTREE=	yes
 XNO_WRKSUBDIR=	yes
 X
 Xpost-extract:
 X	@${CP} ${FILESDIR}/Makefile ${WRKDIR}
 X
 X.include <bsd.port.mk>
 END-of-devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/Makefile
 echo x - devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/distinfo
 sed 's/^X//' >devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/distinfo << 'END-of-devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/distinfo'
 XMD5 (mingw/mingw-runtime-1.0-20010604.tar.gz) = 473f8dfeb7c418417a8254fca9137a2b
 XMD5 (mingw/w32api-1.0-20010606.tar.gz) = 391d284f09cf7d13adccbd4ba50b4638
 END-of-devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/distinfo
 echo x - devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-comment
 sed 's/^X//' >devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-comment << 'END-of-devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-comment'
 XHeaders and Libraries for Windows cross-development
 END-of-devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-comment
 echo x - devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-descr
 sed 's/^X//' >devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-descr << 'END-of-devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-descr'
 XHeaders and Libraries for Windows cross-development.
 X
 XThis port is needed by mingw-gcc/devel.
 END-of-devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-descr
 echo x - devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-plist
 sed 's/^X//' >devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-plist << 'END-of-devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/pkg-plist'

 X# $FreeBSD$
 X
 Xall:
 X
 Xinstall:
 X	mkdir -p ${PREFIX}/bin
 X	install -c -g wheel -o root -m 0755 bin/mingwm10.dll ${PREFIX}/bin
 X	mkdir -p /usr/local/i386-mingw32msvc
 X	cp -R lib include ${PREFIX}/i386-mingw32msvc
 END-of-devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt/files/Makefile
 echo c - devel/mingw-binutils
 mkdir -p devel/mingw-binutils > /dev/null 2>&1
 echo x - devel/mingw-binutils/Makefile
 sed 's/^X//' >devel/mingw-binutils/Makefile << 'END-of-devel/mingw-binutils/Makefile'
 X# New ports collection makefile for: mingw-binutils
 X# Date created:		28 June 2001
 X# Whom:			Michal Pasternak <doc@hisio.safenet.pl>
 X#
 X# $FreeBSD$
 X#
 X
 XPORTNAME=	binutils
 XPORTVERSION=	2.11.90
 XCATEGORIES=	devel
 XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	mingw
 XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	mingw-
 XDISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-20010705-src${EXTRACT_SUFFIX}
 XDIST_SUBDIR=	mingw
 X
 XMAINTAINER=	doc@hisio.safenet.pl
 X
 XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}
 X
 XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
 XUSE_LIBTOOL=	yes
 XCONFIGURE_ARGS=	--target=i386-mingw32msvc
 X
 XMAN1=	i386-mingw32msvc-addr2line.1 \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-ar.1        \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-as.1        \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-c++filt.1   \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-ld.1        \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-nlmconv.1   \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-nm.1        \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-objcopy.1   \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-objdump.1   \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-ranlib.1    \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-size.1      \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-strings.1   \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-strip.1
 X
 Xpost-install:
 X	@for file in \
 X	  addr2line ar as c++filt dlltool gasp ld nm \
 X	  objcopy objdump ranlib size strings strip windres; \
 X	do \
 X	  strip ${PREFIX}/bin/i386-mingw32msvc-$${file}; \
 X	done
 X	@for file in ar as dlltool ld nm ranlib strip; \
 X	do \
 X	  strip ${PREFIX}/i386-mingw32msvc/bin/$${file}; \
 X	done
 X
 X.include <bsd.port.mk>
 END-of-devel/mingw-binutils/Makefile

 sed 's/^X//' >devel/mingw-binutils/distinfo << 'END-of-devel/mingw-binutils/distinfo'

 X# New ports collection makefile for: mingw-gcc
 X# Date created:		28 June 2001
 X# Whom:			Michal Pasternak <doc@hisio.safenet.pl>
 X#
 X# $FreeBSD$
 X#
 X
 XPORTNAME=	gcc
 XPORTVERSION=	2.95.3
 XCATEGORIES=	devel
 XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR= mingw
 XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	mingw-
 XDISTNAME=	gcc-${PORTVERSION}-20010723-src
 XDIST_SUBDIR=	mingw
 X
 XMAINTAINER=	doc@hisio.safenet.pl
 X
 XBUILD_DEPENDS=	i386-mingw32msvc-as:${PORTSDIR}/devel/mingw-binutils \
 X		mingwm10.dll:${PORTSDIR}/devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt \
 X		autoheader:${PORTSDIR}/devel/autoconf
 XRUN_DEPENDS=	i386-mingw32msvc-as:${PORTSDIR}/devel/mingw-binutils \
 X		mingwm10.dll:${PORTSDIR}/devel/mingw-bin-msvcrt
 X
 XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}
 X
 XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
 XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 XCONFIGURE_ARGS=	--target=i386-mingw32msvc \
 X		--with-gxx-include-dir=${PREFIX}/lib/gcc-lib/i386-mingw32msvc/${PORTVERSION}/include/g++
 X
 XPLIST_SUB=	PORTVERSION="${PORTVERSION}"
 X
 XMAN1=	cccp.1                 \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-g++.1 \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-g77.1 \
 X	i386-mingw32msvc-gcc.1
 X
 Xpost-install:
 X	@for file in \
 X	  cpp gcov  \
 X	  i386-mingw32msvc-c++ \
 X	  i386-mingw32msvc-c++filt \
 X	  i386-mingw32msvc-g++ \
 X	  i386-mingw32msvc-g77 \
 X	  i386-mingw32msvc-gcc \
 X	  i386-mingw32msvc-protoize \
 X	  i386-mingw32msvc-unprotoize; \
 X	do \
 X	  strip ${PREFIX}/bin/$${file}; \
 X	done
 X
 X.include <bsd.port.mk>
 END-of-devel/mingw-gcc/Makefile
